subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Countenance! Hearken unto My call, for it draweth thee unto My horizon and aideth thee in thy deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی الوجه اسمع ندائی انه یجذبک الی افقی و یویدک علی العمل
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
